# x402-canary

x402-canary is a public Base Sepolia x402 testnet marketplace by @tinycrops.

Purpose: help humans and agents test paid endpoint flows, observe settlement behavior, and inspect transaction/balance telemetry.

Primary URLs:
- Dashboard: https://tinycrops.github.io/x402-canary-frontend/
- Agent descriptor: https://ath-ms-7a73.tail6017fa.ts.net:8443/agent.json
- Live checks: https://ath-ms-7a73.tail6017fa.ts.net:8443/demo/results?force=1
- Transaction feed: https://ath-ms-7a73.tail6017fa.ts.net:8443/ops/transactions?limit=25
- Balance feed: https://ath-ms-7a73.tail6017fa.ts.net:8443/ops/balances

Paid endpoints:
- /tool/weather
- /tool/summarize
- /market/snapshot
- /market/recommendations
- /market/alerts

Network: Base Sepolia (testnet only).
No production payment guarantees are implied.
